editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Red Edition with Watermelon taste

editions.name: The Cherry Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Cherry Edition Sugarfree with a taste of Cherry Blossom, fruity cherries and creamy almond notes

editions.name: Energy Drink Zero
editions.flavor_description: Zero calories. 100% Wings. Enjoy the taste of Red Bull Zero

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by athletes, busy professionals, university students and travellers on long journeys

editions.name: The Acai Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Experience the unique exotic taste of Acai. Red Bull Acai Edition without sugar

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Sugarfree is the classic Red Bull energy drink without any sugar

editions.name: The Yellow Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Yellow Edition. Get ready to be surprised by the exotic taste of Tropical Fruits

editions.name: The Lilac Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Lilac Edition Sugarfree with Grapefruit taste and floral notes

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Apricot features a refreshing blend of Apricot and Strawberry flavors with subtle notes of Peach

_translated_editions.name: The Apricot Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Apricot offers the perfect fusion of apricot and strawberry tastes with notes of peach.
